/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/url_shortener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/uri_map_singleton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/observability/LogLevel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/observability/LoggingConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/observability/LogFields.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/observability/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/url_shortener.dir/src/observability/LoggerFactory.cpp.o -o url_shortener  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
